profile.name: Harish R
profile.tagline: Building end-to-end AI solutions — from data and models to deployment.
profile.summary: AI & ML professional with hands-on experience as a Machine Learning Intern developing data-driven and AI-powered applications. Skilled in Python, machine learning, and full-stack development with knowledge of generative AI and LLM concepts. Experienced in building end-to-end solutions from data processing and model development to deployment.

highlights: Developed an ML-based job recommendation system.
Applied content-based and collaborative filtering techniques.
Performed data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model evaluation.
Improved recommendation relevance by analyzing user behavior and skill similarity.
Developed an Education Portal web application with JWT authentication.
Built a responsive frontend with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Developed backend APIs using Node.js and Express.js.

projects.title: LLM-based Intelligent Document Processing System
projects.description: Modular document processing pipeline combining OCR, LLM inference, and rule-based post-processing. Added prompt-driven validation and schema-based consistency checks, reducing manual document review through automated cross-field validation.

projects.title: Kidney Stone Classification using Deep Learning
projects.description: Binary classification of kidney CT images using InceptionV3, with domain-specific medical image preprocessing on non-contrast CT scans. Evaluated using accuracy and probability-based thresholding.

projects.title: Web-Based Data Analytics and Reporting System
projects.description: FastAPI backend for dataset upload, processing, and analytics. Built RESTful APIs for data validation, analytics computation, and report generation, with automated workflows for scheduled report export.

education.institution: Dr. Mahalingam College of Engineering & Technology
